title: Clever LMS Connect - Gradebook Sync Beginner's Guide
heading: Teacher
parentHeadings: Clever LMS Connect - Gradebook Sync Beginner's Guide
content:
#### Teacher

You can confirm the creation of your assignment by logging in to Canvas as a demo teacher. Please reach out to [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#d6bfb8a2b3b1a4b7a2bfb9b8a596b5bab3a0b3a4f8b5b9bb) to request end-user credentials for testing.

![Description of the image](https://files.readme.io/437a7069375df49a21b4a89cc3e692cc155cbb13b032cdbbc382bfd7349fcf24-image.png)  
_Creating the assignment from the teacher view_

![Description of the image](https://files.readme.io/359a0f98fca301a52d12e06c1fd898cb9b82339b00087c028dcadcc59a7aedc8-image.png)  
_After updating the assignment from the teacher view_

#### Student

Once you've created a submission, you can also take a look from the student perspective. Please reach out to [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#f1989f859496839085989e9f82b1929d94879483df929e9c) to request end-user credentials for testing.

\[Insert Image Here\]  
_The graded submission from the student view_

  
Schoology
